questionHtml:
What explains the presence in living humans of DNA sections which are identical to DNA found in Neanderthals who lived 40 000 years ago?

A. Genetic mutation

B. Inheritance

C. Adaptation

D. Speciation

meta.title: What explains the presence in living humans of DNA sections which are identical to DNA found in Neanderthals who lived 40 000 years ago? A. Genetic mutation B. Inheritance C. Adapt
